name: ALLIANCEBERNSTEIN HOLDING L.P.
business: AllianceBernstein provides investment advisory and asset management services to institutional, retail, and private wealth clients, deriving most revenues from fees based on assets under management.

exposures.sentence: Our increasing integration of artificial intelligence ("AI") and machine learning into our investment processes and business operations subject us to potential legal, financial and reputational risks.

Any significant security breach of our information and cyber security infrastructure, as well as our failure to properly escalate and respond to such an incident, may significantly harm our operations and reputation.
